title: isoetes setacea subsp. longissima
intro: Isoetes setacea subsp. longissima, also known as the long-leaf quillwort, is a rare and unique plant species belonging to the quillwort family (Isoetaceae). It is used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and acting as a natural diuretic. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, or added to salves and ointments for topical application.
